description: CompositionBlack hooded top made of 100% cotton, has a deep V-neckline and a half buttoned mock placket, a short contrast patch under the mock placket, long sleeves with panel stitch at the cuff and drawstrings for the hood.FitRegularWash careonly hand wash in cold water using a mild detergentWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleach, wring or tumble dryFlat dry in shadeMild iron, and do not iron on print/embellishment/embroideryThis season's understated trend is perfectly captured in this top with its plush fabric. The button detailing and mock placket in this piece gives it an interesting dimension. Style this top from s.oliver with denims and closed-toe casual flats.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
